title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Siemens India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Siemens India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India Ventures Solutions in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India Ventures Solutions:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Ventures Solutions!
